## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Okta's retail-focused identity solutions and explore potential areas for GrowthX to assist with sales enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Workforce identity solutions for retail aren't significantly differentiated from other industries, except for retail floor workers (partnered with Oloid)](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Customer identity is where the retail-specific story has more traction, positioning it as a marketing/loyalty tool rather than just security](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Okta vs Auth0 positioning remains unclear, with general guidance to sell Okta to IT/security teams and Auth0 to developers](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [SDR team operates separately from product marketing, creating potential gaps in early-stage pipeline conversion](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

## Topics

### Okta's Identity Solutions for Retail

  - [Workforce identity:](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Limited industry-specific differentiation for retail](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Exception: Retail floor workers solution (partnered with Oloid) for high-turnover, seasonal staff without dedicated devices](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [Potential to explore retail-specific application integrations](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Customer identity:](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [More retail-specific differentiation and momentum](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [Positioning as marketing/loyalty tool rather than just security burden](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Resonating well with recent customer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Okta vs Auth0 Positioning

  - [Ongoing challenge within the company since February split](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [General guidance:](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Sell Okta to IT and security teams](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Sell Auth0 to developers and technical product teams](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Separate sales teams for Okta and Auth0, unclear coordination at SDR level](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Potential for conflicting outreach to same companies](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Unclear process for inbound lead routing between products](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Sales Enablement Challenges

  - [SDR team operates separately from product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Significant drop-off at stage two of sales pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Limited interaction between product marketing and SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Opportunity to better equip SDRs with retail-specific customer identity story](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Potential Areas for GrowthX Assistance

  - [Help SDRs understand and communicate the retail-specific customer identity story](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Explore ways to reduce stage two drop-off in sales pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Investigate retail-specific application integrations for workforce identity positioning](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Clarify Okta vs Auth0 positioning for SDRs in retail context](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to reconnect with Rachel to clarify focus areas and potential value add](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Explore possibility of connecting with Okta's SDR team directly](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Review internal FAQ document on Okta vs Auth0 differences (shared by Bradford with Rachel)](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Consider developing materials to help SDRs better communicate the retail customer identity story](https://fathom.video/share/dHUrp3FxJvs14AoHkgvaUW3nnzVBeMTv?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
